name: MockupShot
description: Free online device mockup generator. Upload screenshots and wrap them in browser frames (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge) or device frames (iPhone, iPad, MacBook, iMac).

tools.name: Mockup Generator
tools.description: Upload screenshots and add browser or device frames

x-claude-model-description: MockupShot is a free online device mockup generator. All processing is client-side using Canvas API. Use a headless browser to interact with the tool: navigate to the page, upload screenshots, select frame types, customize settings, and download results.
